LanguageData.MoltenSlug.label: molten slug
LanguageData.MoltenSlug.description: An alloy slug heated nearly to the melting point.
LanguageData.HDSlug.label: high-density alloy slug
LanguageData.HDSlug.description: A dense alloy slug heated nearly to the melting point. intended to defeat heavy armor.
LanguageData.Slag.label: slag round
LanguageData.KineticEnergy.label: kinetic energy
LanguageData.KineticEnergy.description: Special ionized electricity from the power core gets turned into a hard energy amalgam in the gun breech, the amalgam doesn't burn like normal energy projectiles, instead it deals blunt damage, hence the name kinetic energy.
LanguageData.CarbonCrystal.label: carbon crystal
LanguageData.CarbonCrystal.description: The carbon crystal core shatters into sharp splinter that maximize flesh damage but produces less armor penetration.
LanguageData.MoltenShell.label: molten shell
LanguageData.MoltenShell.description: An alloy shell heated nearly to the melting point.
